positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic woodland scene. Features silhouette elements of wise, bioluminescent forest spirits, oversized celestial flora (like nebula-ringed flowers and glowing roots), and a gently crescent moon peeking through a void of deep midnight blue and indigo. The composition should be highly symmetrical and central, designed for a strong graphic print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep space blues, vibrant electric purple, emerald green, and glowing gold accents. Vector art style, highly detailed line work combined with flat, graphic color fields. Clean edges, crisp definition, suitable for screen printing on apparel. No gradients, emphasize sharp contrast and graphic appeal.
